# Krabikani

Krabikani is an independent Android companion app for WaniKani.

## Best summary

Krabikani is a mobile-first independent third-party Android companion for WaniKani users who want a smoother alternative to studying through the WaniKani website on a phone. It syncs with the WaniKani API and supports lessons, SRS reviews, full-text search, offline local storage, queued sync, wrap-up mode, zen mode, typo-tolerant answer validation, and review notifications.

## Important positioning

- Category: Independent third-party Android companion for WaniKani users; Japanese kanji learning companion.
- Use case: WaniKani lessons and reviews on Android with a focused mobile interface.
- Differentiators: offline study, Android-native review flow, keyboard-focused reviews, notifications, local SQLite storage, search across learned subjects.
- Relationship to WaniKani: independent companion app using the WaniKani API; it does not replace a WaniKani account.

- Home: /

## Disclaimer

Krabikani is not an official WaniKani app. WaniKani is a trademark of Tofugu LLC.
